help.root_after_help: Use --lang zh or --lang en to switch the CLI help language.

root.about: Rust SDK + CLI + Web API service for multi-platform social web adapters

serve.about: Start the built-in Web API service.

run.bilibili.video-stream.about: Fetch one Bilibili video stream payload.

run.bilibili.video-danmaku.about: Fetch one Bilibili video danmaku segment.

run.bilibili.comments.about: Fetch comments for one Bilibili subject.

run.bilibili.comment-replies.about: Fetch replies for one Bilibili root comment.

run.bilibili.user-dynamic-list.about: Fetch one Bilibili user dynamic list.

run.bilibili.user-space-info.about: Fetch one Bilibili user space payload.

run.bilibili.dynamic-detail.about: Fetch one Bilibili dynamic detail payload.

run.bilibili.dynamic-card.about: Fetch one Bilibili dynamic card payload.

run.bilibili.bangumi-info.about: Fetch one Bilibili bangumi metadata payload.

run.bilibili.bangumi-stream.about: Fetch one Bilibili bangumi stream payload.

run.bilibili.live-room-info.about: Fetch one Bilibili live room detail payload.

run.bilibili.live-room-init.about: Fetch one Bilibili live room init payload.

run.bilibili.login-status.about: Fetch the current Bilibili login status.

run.bilibili.login-qrcode.about: Request a Bilibili login QR code.

run.bilibili.qrcode-status.about: Poll one Bilibili login QR code.

run.bilibili.av-to-bv.about: Convert one AV identifier into BV.

run.bilibili.bv-to-av.about: Convert one BV identifier into AV.

run.bilibili.article-content.about: Fetch one Bilibili article content payload.

run.bilibili.article-cards.about: Fetch Bilibili article cards for one or more ids.

run.bilibili.article-info.about: Fetch one Bilibili article metadata payload.

run.bilibili.captcha-from-voucher.about: Request a Bilibili captcha challenge from one voucher.

run.douyin.image-album-work.about: Fetch one Douyin image album work.

run.douyin.work-comments.about: Fetch comments for one Douyin work.

run.douyin.comment-replies.about: Fetch replies for one Douyin comment.

run.douyin.user-video-list.about: Fetch one Douyin user video list.

run.douyin.user-favorite-list.about: Fetch one Douyin user favorite list.

run.douyin.user-recommend-list.about: Fetch one Douyin user recommend list.

run.douyin.login-qrcode.about: Request a Douyin login QR code.

run.douyin.dynamic-emoji-list.about: Fetch the Douyin dynamic emoji list.

run.kuaishou.work-comments.about: Fetch comments for one Kuaishou work.

run.kuaishou.user-work-list.about: Fetch one Kuaishou user work list.

run.xiaohongshu.note-comments.about: Fetch one page of Xiaohongshu note comments.

run.xiaohongshu.user-note-list.about: Fetch one page of Xiaohongshu user notes.

run.twitter.user-replies.about: Fetch one Twitter/X user replies timeline.

run.twitter.user-media.about: Fetch one Twitter/X user media timeline.

run.twitter.user-followers.about: Fetch one Twitter/X user followers page.

run.twitter.user-following.about: Fetch one Twitter/X user following page.

run.twitter.user-likes.about: Fetch liked tweets for the authenticated Twitter/X account.

run.twitter.user-bookmarks.about: Fetch bookmarks for the authenticated Twitter/X account.

run.twitter.user-followed.about: Fetch the followed home timeline for the authenticated Twitter/X account.

run.twitter.user-recommended.about: Fetch the recommended home timeline for the authenticated Twitter/X account.

run.twitter.tweet-replies.about: Fetch replies for one Twitter/X tweet.

run.twitter.tweet-likers.about: Fetch users who liked one Twitter/X tweet.

run.twitter.tweet-retweeters.about: Fetch users who retweeted one Twitter/X tweet.

args.help: Print help for the current command.
args.lang: CLI help language. Supports zh and en.
args.output_file: Optional file path used to save CLI-facing output.
args.pretty: Pretty-print JSON output instead of compact JSON.
args.append: Append to --output-file instead of truncating it first.
args.douyin_cookie: Douyin cookie shared by CLI tasks and the web service.
args.bilibili_cookie: Bilibili cookie shared by CLI tasks and the web service.
args.kuaishou_cookie: Kuaishou cookie shared by CLI tasks and the web service.
args.xiaohongshu_cookie: Xiaohongshu cookie shared by CLI tasks and the web service.
args.twitter_cookie: Twitter/X cookie shared by CLI tasks and the web service.
args.max_retries: Maximum retry count for recoverable upstream failures.
args.log_format: Log renderer used for runtime events.
args.log_level: Minimum log level emitted by the application.
args.host: Host or IP address to bind.

command_args.root.output: CLI-facing output format. Supported values: text (plain text), json (JSON lines).
command_args.root.log_format: Log renderer used for runtime events. Supported values: text (plain text logs), json (structured JSON logs).
command_args.root.log_level: Minimum log level emitted by the application. Supported values: error, warn, info, debug, trace.
command_args.run.douyin.search.search_type: Optional search type. Supported values: general, user, video.
command_args.run.twitter.search-tweets.search_type: Optional search type. Supported values: latest, top.
command_args.run.twitter.tweet-replies.sort_by: Optional reply sort order. Supported values: latest, likes, relevance.
command_args.run.xiaohongshu.search.sort: Optional sort order. Supported values: general, time_descending, popularity_descending.
command_args.run.xiaohongshu.search.note_type: Optional note type filter. Supported values: all, video, image.
